title: Experience Schema
description: Schema candidate for Experience Engine records derived from patterns and supported cases. Experience records are research-only and do not directly change decisions.

boundary_rule: Experience must not directly change Decision.
Experience weight is research-only and not production scoring.
Experience promotion requires separate architecture review and validation.

validation_notes: Experience records are not Production Rules.
Experience records must not directly change runtime, pipeline, scoring, Dashboard, main.py, or final decisions.
experience_weight is a research field only.
